'''Haduran''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] and a friend of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. He fought in the [[Ruusan campaign]] and was one of the members of the Army of Light who survived the [[Thought bomb]] unleashed by [[Sith Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan]] and the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] due to his lack of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitivity]]. After the detonation of the thought bomb, he was ordered by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]] to kill any [[bouncer]]s seen just in case they had gone mad after the bomb.<ref name="POD">''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''</ref>
